changes.summary: Deleted legacy community FAB superseded by CreateMenu (floating portal menu with project posts, telemetry, and shared permission logic).
Already removed on branch (orphaned home FAB); no remaining imports. Create flows use CreateMenu in BottomNavigation, VerticalSidebar, and CommunityPageClient via useMeriterCommunityCreateContext.

notes: FabMenu.tsx was unused (knip dead export). HomeFabMenu.tsx deletion predates this attempt (chore commit a9583ced); this work unit completes FabMenu retirement so FabMenu/ exports only CreateMenu.
